name: Licorice Root
summary: Licorice Root entry from SciSpace evidence pass. Evidence level: limited/safety-limited.
description: Licorice Root is cataloged as triterpenoid saponin botanical. Reported mechanisms: glycyrrhizin inhibits 11β-HSD2 increasing cortisol activity; anti-inflammatory effects.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
